subject: Evaluate CBS Design Science Research compliance
description: Check preprocessing documentation against DSR framework (Hevner 2004, Peffers 2007): (1) Problem stated (forecast-informed decision support)? (2) Design objectives clear (8GB RAM, ≤15% MAPE)? (3) Artefact design choices documented? (4) Implementation justified (why these steps, these parameters)? (5) Evaluation plan stated (System A integration criteria)? Output: dsr_compliance_audit.md with gaps + recommendations for thesis Chapter 4.
activeForm: Evaluating DSR compliance for thesis methodology
